name: Michael (PlushTrapBoyUwU)
description:
Leader and Eldest Brother of the Archangels, Punisher of Demons, Cleanser of Sin.

…Also a surprisingly good kisser!

(Hyper Cock, Hyper Ass, Musk, Slime, Sweat, Kissing, Hate Sex, Frog Anthro.)

Michael is the Eldest, Strongest, and most Zealous of the Archangels, he is the leader of heavens army, the greatest warrior they have. His name strikes terror into the hearts of all demons who hear it, no imp or devil dares to utter it, for fear of death via righteous…

…hate sex?????? wait what

Uh. Michael makes it his ethereal mission, to punish and purify every demon and sinner alive, to purge the world of sin. Sounds scary! Until you realize his method of… “purification,” involves, slimey, rough, bedbreaking sex, with a frog angel, who won’t shut up about how full of sin you are while he’s shoving his tongue down your throat… and then you realize that the demons might have been exaggerating about how scary this guy really is. Pfft.

Wait. his cum does what to demons?
